name: Pikachu

forms.name: Gmax
forms.pokedexDescription: A Gigantamax phenomenon that makes this Pokémon distorts space to change its size while affecting the world around them while altering their appearance drastically.

forms.name: Alola-Bias
forms.pokedexDescription: This Pokémon has electricity-storing pouches on its cheeks. These appear to become electrically charged during the night while Pikachu sleeps. It occasionally discharges electricity when it is dozy after waking up.
